title: Cyclobalanus reinwardtii
taxonomy: Cyclobalanus reinwardtii is classified as a species of plant in the family Fagaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyclobalanus, which is a group of plants closely related to beeches and chestnuts. Cyclobalanus reinwardtii is native to Southeast Asia, where it grows in the tropical forests of countries such as Indonesia and Malaysia. This plant is a type of evergreen tree or shrub, characterized by its broad, leathery leaves and small, yellow flowers. The specific classification of Cyclobalanus reinwardtii is further detailed in the botanical nomenclature, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Fagaceae family.
